_comment: 2026-06-26: ratcheted from the CI-measured line coverage on run 28250327371 / e785648e (global 94.34%, 50787/53835). Floors sit below measured rates as no-regression baselines while keeping generated/experimental/studio domains visible. Branch coverage remains deferred: enabling [tool.coverage.run] branch=true inflates coverage-job instrumentation and flips tight wall-clock perf tests under coverage; re-add branch together with a branch-rate gate after those perf tests are trace-robust.
